question: Does the model's final answer explicitly state 'No', confirming that 2020 was not the year China's exports to the United States reached their highest value?
Does the model correctly identify 2018 as the year with the highest export value (the peak of the blue line)?
Does the model correctly observe that the export value in 2018 (approx. 480B) is visually higher than the export value in 2020 (approx. 450B)?
Does the model avoid hallucinating a strictly monotonic increasing trend throughout the period, correctly acknowledging the fluctuations (ups and downs) in the data?
